channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][公开] Anime News Network Goodbye, Lara Anime的 3rd 宣传视频 Video 公开 Hana Hope的 Ending Theme
item.description: 2 more cast members announced for series debuting on July 5 ― Kadokawa revealed a third promotional video for the Goodbye, Lara (Sayonara Lara) original anime on Saturday. The video reveals and... | 来源: ANN | 原文: 'Goodbye, Lara' Anime's 3rd Promo Video Reveals Hana Hope's Ending Theme
